content: The BoG of the Institute in its 52nd meeting held on 01/02/2020 vide BG 52.07 has resolved to implement the amendments in the CCS (Leave) Rules, 1972.
The amendments are based on the Gazette of India notification dated 11th December 2018 and DoPT OM No. 11020/01/2017-Estt.(L) dated 30.08.2019.
The date of effect of the amendment will be from 14.12.2018.
The leave taken by the employees will be regulated in accordance with the amended leave rules.
